description: Perform a statistical comparison of means for the 'Age' variable grouped by the 'Ill' variable using the Oswego dataset located in 'C:\Epi Info 7\Projects\Sample\Sample.prj'. Save the analysis results as an HTML file to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\oswego_means_output.html'. Additionally, create a summary text file at 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\means_summary.txt' containing the mean age for the 'Ill=Yes' group on line 1, the mean age for the 'Ill=No' group on line 2, the ANOVA p-value on line 3, and the significance status ('Significant' or 'Not Significant' based on p < 0.05) on line 4.
